title: FPS Booster
description:
Optimizes Minecraft for better performance, higher FPS, reduced lag, and smoother gameplay.

1.21.9-1.21.10 Beta
body:
# Introduction Welcome! The FPS Booster Modpack is a collection of mods for Minecraft aimed at reducing lag and enhancing game performance by increasing the frames per second (FPS) you experience. Enjoy smoother gameplay and enhanced optimization with this modpack. # Recommendation 1. Make sure your **V-Sync is enabled** to reduce GPU load. 2. ~~If you have a Nvidia 16 series or higher video card, I recommend adding [Nvidium](https://modrinth.com/mod/nvidium) it is very good to increase your fps.~~ > ~~Nvidium mod is not functional on **non-Nvidia systems**, but the Nvidium will automatically disable itself. Your gameplay will not be affected.~~ ## This Modpack Was Tested on This System Here’s the system setup I used: ### 1. PC **V-Sync Disabled** - Avg **315 FPS** with BSL Shaders **Enabled** - Avg **1059 FPS** with BSL Shaders **Disabled** **V-Sync Enabled** - Constant **200 FPS**, both with and without BSL Shaders | Component | Specification | |------------|-------------------------------| | Monitor | MAG 255F E20 200Hz | | CPU | AMD Ryzen 7 9700X | | GPU | RTX 5070 12GB | | RAM | 64GB |
### 2. Laptop: MSI GF63-9SCSR **V-Sync Enabled** - Avg **110 FPS** with BSL Shaders **Enabled** - Avg **120 FPS** with BSL Shaders **Disabled** | Component | Specification | |------------|-------------------------------| | CPU | Intel i7-9750H | | GPU | GTX 1650 Ti (Max-Q Design) | | RAM | 24GB | # How to Play the Modpacks? - You can use [Modrinth App](https://modrinth.com/app) or read [documentation](https://support.modrinth.com/en/articles/8802250-modpacks-on-modrinth) about modpack installation in other launchers ## Additional Support me on: - [Ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/nakirium) - [Buy me a coffee](https://buymeacoffee.com/nakirium)
